cases.case: IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.DistributedLockExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldReturnStableLockFailureWithoutSensitiveDetails(failure: "conflict", expectedStatus: 409, expectedDetail: "请求正在由其他操作处理，请稍后重试。")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.DistributedLockExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldReturnStableLockFailureWithoutSensitiveDetails(failure: "unavailable", expectedStatus: 503, expectedDetail: "请求协调服务暂时不可用，请稍后重试。")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.DistributedLockExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldReturnStableLockFailureWithoutSensitiveDetails(failure: "ownership-lost", expectedStatus: 503, expectedDetail: "请求协调状态已失效，请稍后重试。")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.UseCaseExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldMapKnownAndUnknownRuntimeExceptions(exceptionKind: "timeout", expectedStatus: 409, expectedTitle: "请求冲突", expectedDetail: "operation timed out")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.UseCaseExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldMapKnownAndUnknownRuntimeExceptions(exceptionKind: "argument", expectedStatus: 400, expectedTitle: "请求参数错误", expectedDetail: "invalid argument")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.UseCaseExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldMapKnownAndUnknownRuntimeExceptions(exceptionKind: "invalid-operation", expectedStatus: 400, expectedTitle: "请求参数错误", expectedDetail: "invalid state")

IIoT.CloudPlatform.HttpTests.UseCaseExceptionHandlerTests.Handler_ShouldMapKnownAndUnknownRuntimeExceptions(exceptionKind: "unknown", expectedStatus: 500, expectedTitle: "服务器内部错误", expectedDetail: "服务器处理请求时发生未预期错误。")
